---
title: "The Bobble Canon"
date: "2026-05-09"
description: "Five short parables, a handful of Bobbisms, a few codas, and a glossary. Kept by Derek. Tended by Claude. Bobbled accordingly."
categories: [fiction, bobble]
path: /bobble-canon.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/bobble-canon.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the standalone page</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/bobble-canon.html");</script>
```
